description: After a payroll run, the specialist must remit the withheld federal and state taxes to the appropriate government agencies.

nodes.task_description: Generate a report of all payroll tax liabilities from the latest payroll run.

expected_outcome.value: Agent gets a report showing the amounts due for federal income tax, FICA, and state income tax.

nodes.task_description: Initiate electronic payments for the tax liabilities via the Electronic Federal Tax Payment System (EFTPS) and the state's equivalent system.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully schedules the required tax payments before the deadline.

nodes.task_description: Record the tax payments in the general ledger.

expected_outcome.value: Agent posts the journal entry to clear the tax liability accounts.
